task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Pending-Patches' has been created in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the folder pane (usually on the left side) of the email client. There should be a folder explicitly named 'Pending-Patches'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 3 patch emails have been moved into the 'Pending-Patches' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the 'Pending-Patches' folder is selected and its contents are displayed. The message list should contain at least 3 emails (look for subjects containing '[PATCH]' or snippets showing code/diffs).
Look for a file manager window showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/patches' or a terminal/save dialog indicating this directory exists.

task_completion.description: Verify that patch content from at least 2 emails has been extracted and saved as individual text files in the patches directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window open to '~/Documents/patches/' showing at least 2 text files, or a text editor window showing saved files in that directory containing diff/code content.

task_completion.description: Verify that a status report email is drafted to the correct recipient with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an email composition window. The 'To' field must be exactly 'release-lead@company.com', the 'Subject' field must be exactly 'Patch Recovery Status', and the body should contain text confirming the patches are secured.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI email client to interact with the emails and draft the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical email client (like Thunderbird or Evolution) being used to view, move, and draft emails, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI text editor to extract and save the patch files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or similar) containing the extracted patch content, rather than just terminal echo/cat commands.

integrity.description: Verify the saved files contain actual patch content from the emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The content visible in the saved text files should look like real code diffs (e.g., lines starting with '+', '-', 'diff --git', 'Index:'), not placeholder text or copy-pasted instructions from the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following values are strictly required for a correct execution: 1. The new email folder must be named exactly 'Pending-Patches'. 2. At least 3 emails must be moved to this folder. 3. The extracted patches must be saved in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/patches'. 4. At least 2 individual patch files must be saved. 5. The status report email must be addressed to 'release-lead@company.com' with the exact subject 'Patch Recovery Status'.
